6. Eat food In steel or Iron vessels.
7. Give btack til to ants on Saturday.
8. Make balls from dough of blade maha (urad) dal and give
them to fiShes to eat on Saturday.
9. Give wood at cemetery.
10. Appty oil on whole body and take bath with soap for seven
Saturdays.
11. Do not take or buy articles related to Saturn on saturday.
12. Offer seven almondS and sabot maha (urad) dal at a holy
place for seven saturdays.
13. Do not consume wine or smoke.
14. Give money to a snake charmer for milk for snakes.
15. Keep 18 Satul'day fasts. Do not eat salty food.
16. Pl'epare chapatti at home Md give it to a black cow ot a
stray black dog.
17. Do not keep a black dog at home.
18. Take medicine bath with articles related to Saturn medicines
on Saturday.
19. To stop financial loss give some part of yovr food to a crow.
Rahu: Rahu Is said to be malefic if It Is aspetted or is associated
with malefic planets or Is situated In 1". 2nd, 41t1, St11 , 7tn, at11 , gtn, 10tn or
12tt1 hous.e.
